{"credits": [{"type": "remediation_developer", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/33833274?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ansasaki/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ansasaki/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ansasaki/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ansasaki/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ansasaki", "id": 33833274, "login": "ansasaki", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjMzODMzMjc0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ansasaki/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ansasaki/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ansasaki/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ansasaki/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ansasaki/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ansasaki", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2025-1057", "cvss": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-704", "name": "Incorrect Type Conversion or Cast"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-1287", "name": "Improper Validation of Specified Type of Input"}], "description": "### Impact
The Keylime `registrar` implemented more strict type checking on version 7.12.0. As a result, when updated to version 7.12.0, the `registrar` will not accept the format of the data previously stored in the database by versions  >= 7.8.0, raising an exception.

This makes the Keylime `registrar` vulnerable to a Denial-of-Service attack in an update scenario, as an attacker could populate the `registrar` database by creating multiple valid agent registrations with different UUIDs while the version is still < 7.12.0. Then, when the Keylime `registrar` is updated to the 7.12.0 version, any query to the database matching any of the entries populated by the attacker will result in failure.

### Patches
Users should upgrade to versions >= 7.12.1

### Workarounds
- Remove the registrar database and re-register all agents

### Credit

Reported by: Anderson Toshiyuki Sasaki/@ansasaki
Patched by: Anderson Toshiyuki Sasaki/@ansasaki", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00365, "percentile": 0.28514}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9jxq-5x44-gx23", "github_reviewed_at": "2025-02-14T18:03:14Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9jxq-5x44-gx23", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9jxq-5x44-gx23"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-1057"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-03-15T09:15:10Z", "published_at": "2025-02-14T18:03:14Z", "references": ["https://github.com/keylime/keylime/security/advisories/GHSA-9jxq-5x44-gx23", "https://github.com/keylime/keylime/commit/e08b10d86c3717006774e787542c190e2ba24fc7", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-1057", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2025-1057", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2343894", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9jxq-5x44-gx23", "https://github.com/ansasaki/keylime/tree/base64_bytes", "https://github.com/keylime/keylime", "https://github.com/keylime/rust-keylime", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/keylime/PYSEC-2026-1488.yaml", "https://pypi.org/project/keylime"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/keylime/keylime/security-advisories/GHSA-9jxq-5x44-gx23", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/keylime/keylime", "summary": "Keylime registrar is vulnerable to Denial-of-Service attack when updated to version 7.12.0", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-21T14:45:56Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9jxq-5x44-gx23", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.12.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "keylime"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 7.12.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Keylime registrar is vulnerable to Denial-of-Service attack when updated to version 7.12.0
